title: Cyperus triceps
taxonomy: Cyperus triceps is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This family of plants is commonly known as the sedge family and is part of the order Poales. Cyperus triceps is further classified as being in the genus Cyperus and the section Cyperus. The species is native to tropical and subtropical regions, which is a common characteristic of many plants within the Cyperaceae family. The classification of Cyperus triceps reflects its evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other species within the same family.
